title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
